item:tree.name: Tree
item:tree.description: Movable wood source used by nearby lumberjacks.

item:rock.name: Rock
item:rock.description: Movable stone source used by nearby quarries.

item:log.name: Log
item:log.description: Basic wood material produced by lumberjacks.

item:plank.name: Plank
item:plank.description: Processed wood material produced by sawmills.

item:stone.name: Stone
item:stone.description: Basic stone material produced by quarries.

item:stone-block.name: Stone Block
item:stone-block.description: Processed stone material produced by stonemasons.

producer:lumberjack-t1.name: Lumberjack I
producer:lumberjack-t1.description: Produces logs when placed near a tree.

producer:sawmill-t1.name: Sawmill I
producer:sawmill-t1.description: Turns logs into planks when placed near a lumberjack.

producer:quarry-t1.name: Quarry I
producer:quarry-t1.description: Produces stone when placed near a rock.

producer:stonemason-t1.name: Stonemason I
producer:stonemason-t1.description: Turns stone into stone blocks when placed near a quarry.

item:wheat-field.name: Wheat Field
item:wheat-field.description: Movable grain source used by nearby farms.

item:water.name: Water
item:water.description: Basic water resource produced by wells and consumed by farms.

item:grain.name: Grain
item:grain.description: Harvested grain produced by farms and milled into flour or used as pig feed.

item:flour.name: Flour
item:flour.description: Milled grain produced by windmills and baked into bread.

item:bread.name: Bread
item:bread.description: Baked food produced by bakeries from flour and water.

item:piglet.name: Piglet
item:piglet.description: A small piglet produced by pig farms and processed by slaughterhouses.

item:sausage.name: Sausage
item:sausage.description: Meat food produced by slaughterhouses from piglets and consumed by heavy industry workers.

item:leather.name: Leather
item:leather.description: Processed leather produced as a slaughterhouse byproduct from piglets.

producer:farm-t1.name: Farm I
producer:farm-t1.description: Consumes water and produces grain when placed near a wheat field.

producer:bakery-t1.name: Bakery I
producer:bakery-t1.description: Consumes flour and water to bake bread.

producer:pig-farm-t1.name: Pig Farm I
producer:pig-farm-t1.description: Consumes grain and water to produce piglets.

producer:slaughterhouse-t1.name: Slaughterhouse I
producer:slaughterhouse-t1.description: Processes piglets into sausage and leather.

item:hop-field.name: Hop Field
item:hop-field.description: Movable hop source used by nearby breweries.

item:beer-barrel.name: Beer Barrel
item:beer-barrel.description: A barrel of beer produced by breweries and served by taverns.

item:beer.name: Beer
item:beer.description: A single mug of beer served by taverns.

producer:brewery-t1.name: Brewery I
producer:brewery-t1.description: Produces hops from water near a hop field, then brews hops and water into beer barrels.

producer:tavern-t1.name: Tavern I
producer:tavern-t1.description: Serves beer barrels as individual beers.

item:hops.name: Hops
item:hops.description: Harvested hops produced by breweries when supplied with water near a hop field.

item:vineyard.name: Vineyard
item:vineyard.description: Movable vineyard source used by nearby wineries.

item:coal-deposit.name: Coal Deposit
item:coal-deposit.description: Movable coal source used by nearby coal mines.

item:iron-deposit.name: Iron Deposit
item:iron-deposit.description: Movable iron source used by nearby iron mines.

item:gold-deposit.name: Gold Deposit
item:gold-deposit.description: Movable gold source used by nearby gold mines.

item:grapes.name: Grapes
item:grapes.description: Harvested grapes produced by wineries when supplied with water near a vineyard.

item:wine-barrel.name: Wine Barrel
item:wine-barrel.description: A barrel of wine produced by wineries and served by taverns.

item:wine-glass.name: Wine Glass
item:wine-glass.description: A single glass of wine served by taverns.

producer:winery-t1.name: Winery I
producer:winery-t1.description: Produces grapes from water near a vineyard, then presses grapes and water into wine barrels.

item:coal.name: Coal Cart
item:coal.description: A mining cart loaded with coal. Used as fuel by smelters.

item:iron-ore.name: Iron Ore Cart
item:iron-ore.description: A mining cart loaded with iron ore. Smelters refine it into iron ingots.

item:gold-ore.name: Gold Ore Cart
item:gold-ore.description: A mining cart loaded with gold ore. Smelters refine it into gold ingots.

item:iron-ingot.name: Iron Ingot
item:iron-ingot.description: Refined iron produced by smelters from iron ore and coal.

item:gold-ingot.name: Gold Ingot
item:gold-ingot.description: Refined gold produced by smelters from gold ore and coal.

item:pollution.name: Pollution
item:pollution.description: Dirty industrial pollution emitted by smelting. It stays on the board and must be dealt with there.

producer:coal-mine-t1.name: Coal Mine I
producer:coal-mine-t1.description: Consumes bread and water to mine coal carts from a nearby coal deposit.

producer:iron-mine-t1.name: Iron Mine I
producer:iron-mine-t1.description: Consumes sausage and beer to mine iron ore carts from a nearby iron deposit.

producer:gold-mine-t1.name: Gold Mine I
producer:gold-mine-t1.description: Consumes bread and wine to mine gold ore carts from a nearby gold deposit.

producer:smelter-t1.name: Smelter I
producer:smelter-t1.description: Consumes ore, coal fuel, and water to produce metal ingots and pollution.

producer:purifier-t1.name: Purifier I
producer:purifier-t1.description: Consumes board pollution without producing output.

item:coin.name: Coin
item:coin.description: A basic currency output minted by goldsmiths.

producer:goldsmith-t1.name: Goldsmith I
producer:goldsmith-t1.description: Consumes gold ingots, wine, bread, and coal to mint coins.

producer:townhall-t1.name: Town Hall I
producer:townhall-t1.description: Starter civic hub that issues basic settlement blueprints.

producer:townhall-t2.name: Town Hall II
producer:townhall-t2.description: Food-chain civic hub that issues farming, food, brewing, and wine blueprints.

producer:townhall-t3.name: Town Hall III
producer:townhall-t3.description: Industrial civic hub that issues mining, smelting, cleanup, and deposit survey plans.

producer:townhall-t4.name: Town Hall IV
producer:townhall-t4.description: Coin-economy civic hub that issues late specialist blueprints.

item:blueprint-lumberjack-t1.name: Lumberjack I Blueprint
item:blueprint-lumberjack-t1.description: Build plan that can be filled with resources to construct Lumberjack I.

item:blueprint-sawmill-t1.name: Sawmill I Blueprint
item:blueprint-sawmill-t1.description: Build plan that can be filled with resources to construct Sawmill I.

item:blueprint-quarry-t1.name: Quarry I Blueprint
item:blueprint-quarry-t1.description: Build plan that can be filled with resources to construct Quarry I.

item:blueprint-stonemason-t1.name: Stonemason I Blueprint
item:blueprint-stonemason-t1.description: Build plan that can be filled with resources to construct Stonemason I.

item:blueprint-well-t1.name: Well I Blueprint
item:blueprint-well-t1.description: Build plan that can be filled with resources to construct Well I.

item:blueprint-farm-t1.name: Farm I Blueprint
item:blueprint-farm-t1.description: Build plan that can be filled with resources to construct Farm I.

item:blueprint-windmill-t1.name: Windmill I Blueprint
item:blueprint-windmill-t1.description: Build plan that can be filled with resources to construct Windmill I.

item:blueprint-bakery-t1.name: Bakery I Blueprint
item:blueprint-bakery-t1.description: Build plan that can be filled with resources to construct Bakery I.

item:blueprint-pig-farm-t1.name: Pig Farm I Blueprint
item:blueprint-pig-farm-t1.description: Build plan that can be filled with resources to construct Pig Farm I.

item:blueprint-slaughterhouse-t1.name: Slaughterhouse I Blueprint
item:blueprint-slaughterhouse-t1.description: Build plan that can be filled with resources to construct Slaughterhouse I.

item:blueprint-brewery-t1.name: Brewery I Blueprint
item:blueprint-brewery-t1.description: Build plan that can be filled with resources to construct Brewery I.

item:blueprint-tavern-t1.name: Tavern I Blueprint
item:blueprint-tavern-t1.description: Build plan that can be filled with resources to construct Tavern I.

item:blueprint-winery-t1.name: Winery I Blueprint
item:blueprint-winery-t1.description: Build plan that can be filled with resources to construct Winery I.

item:blueprint-coal-mine-t1.name: Coal Mine I Blueprint
item:blueprint-coal-mine-t1.description: Build plan that can be filled with resources to construct Coal Mine I.

item:blueprint-iron-mine-t1.name: Iron Mine I Blueprint
item:blueprint-iron-mine-t1.description: Build plan that can be filled with resources to construct Iron Mine I.

item:blueprint-smelter-t1.name: Smelter I Blueprint
item:blueprint-smelter-t1.description: Build plan that can be filled with resources to construct Smelter I.

item:blueprint-purifier-t1.name: Purifier I Blueprint
item:blueprint-purifier-t1.description: Build plan that can be filled with resources to construct Purifier I.

item:blueprint-gold-mine-t1.name: Gold Mine I Blueprint
item:blueprint-gold-mine-t1.description: Build plan that can be filled with resources to construct Gold Mine I.

item:blueprint-goldsmith-t1.name: Goldsmith I Blueprint
item:blueprint-goldsmith-t1.description: Build plan that can be filled with resources to construct Goldsmith I.

item:blueprint-townhall-t2.name: Town Hall II Blueprint
item:blueprint-townhall-t2.description: Build plan that can be filled with resources to construct Town Hall II.

item:blueprint-townhall-t3.name: Town Hall III Blueprint
item:blueprint-townhall-t3.description: Build plan that can be filled with resources to construct Town Hall III.

item:blueprint-townhall-t4.name: Town Hall IV Blueprint
item:blueprint-townhall-t4.description: Build plan that can be filled with resources to construct Town Hall IV.

producer:heroes-guild-t1.name: Heroes Guild I
producer:heroes-guild-t1.description: Late-era guild that sends paid heroes on long expeditions and returns locked chests.

item:blueprint-heroes-guild-t1.name: Heroes Guild I Blueprint
item:blueprint-heroes-guild-t1.description: Build plan that can be filled with late-era resources to construct Heroes Guild I.

item:chest-t1.name: Chest I
item:chest-t1.description: Locked chest returned from a short heroes guild expedition. Open it with a Key I.

item:chest-t2.name: Chest II
item:chest-t2.description: Locked chest returned from a tougher heroes guild expedition. Open it with a Key II.

item:chest-t3.name: Chest III
item:chest-t3.description: Locked chest returned from a dangerous heroes guild expedition. Open it with a Key III.

item:chest-t4.name: Chest IV
item:chest-t4.description: Locked chest returned from the longest heroes guild expedition. Open it with a Key IV.

item:key-t1.name: Key I
item:key-t1.description: Temporary cheat-only key used to open Chest I.

item:key-t2.name: Key II
item:key-t2.description: Temporary cheat-only key used to open Chest II.

item:key-t3.name: Key III
item:key-t3.description: Crafted key used to open Chest III.

item:key-t4.name: Key IV
item:key-t4.description: Temporary cheat-only key used to open Chest IV.

item:axe.name: Axe
item:axe.description: Reliable expedition weapon forged from iron with a sturdy wooden haft.

item:sword.name: Sword
item:sword.description: Precise expedition weapon that needs extra iron, finishing coal, and a leather grip.

item:leather-armor.name: Leather Armor
item:leather-armor.description: Flexible leather armor prepared on a training dummy for early expeditions.

item:iron-armor.name: Iron Armor
item:iron-armor.description: Heavy iron armor issued to heroes before dangerous late expeditions.

producer:blacksmith-t1.name: Blacksmith I
producer:blacksmith-t1.description: Forges expedition weapons and armor from iron, leather, coal, and wood.

item:blueprint-blacksmith-t1.name: Blacksmith I Blueprint
item:blueprint-blacksmith-t1.description: Build plan that can be filled with metalworking resources to construct Blacksmith I.
